repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.descriptionZhtw: 收錄來自世界各地公開可用的 IPTV 頻道
repos.descriptionEn: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

repos.name: teslamate-org/teslamate
repos.descriptionZhtw: 自架的 Tesla 車輛數據記錄器 🚘
repos.descriptionEn: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘 [main maintainer=@JakobLichterfeld]

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.descriptionZhtw: 讓 AI Agent 能瀏覽整個網路，透過單一 CLI 讀取和搜尋 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小紅書，且無需 API 費用
repos.descriptionEn: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

repos.name: meshery/meshery
repos.descriptionZhtw: Meshery，雲原生基礎設施管理平台

repos.name: krahets/hello-algo
repos.descriptionZhtw: 《Hello 算法》：動畫圖解、一鍵執行的資料結構與演算法教程，支援繁中、簡中、英文、日文及多種程式語言實作
repos.descriptionEn: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

repos.name: jwasham/coding-interview-university
repos.descriptionZhtw: 成為軟體工程師的完整電腦科學自學計畫
repos.descriptionEn: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

repos.name: Free-TV/IPTV
repos.descriptionZhtw: 免費電視頻道的 M3U 播放清單
repos.descriptionEn: M3U Playlist for free TV channels

repos.name: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
repos.descriptionZhtw: 自架服務完全指南，涵蓋本地與私有伺服器架設、Cloud、LLMs、WireGuard、自動化、Home Assistant 及網路設定
repos.descriptionEn: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

repos.name: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
repos.descriptionZhtw: 免費開源的 Windows 效能優化工具，兼顧隱私保護與操作簡便性
repos.descriptionEn: Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

repos.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
repos.descriptionZhtw: AI Agent Skills 安全掃描工具，可偵測漏洞、惡意模式與安全風險
repos.descriptionEn: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

repos.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
repos.descriptionZhtw: Kronos：金融市場語言的基礎模型
repos.descriptionEn: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

repos.name: puppeteer/puppeteer
repos.descriptionZhtw: Chrome 和 Firefox 的 JavaScript 自動化 API
repos.descriptionEn: JavaScript API for Chrome and Firefox

repos.name: cypress-io/cypress
repos.descriptionZhtw: 快速、簡單且可靠的瀏覽器端測試框架
repos.descriptionEn: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

repos.name: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
repos.descriptionZhtw: 以 Rust 撰寫的跨平台 GUI 工具，透過 ADB 清除非 Root Android 裝置的預裝軟體，提升隱私、安全性與電池續航
repos.descriptionEn: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

repos.name: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
repos.descriptionZhtw: VoxCPM2：免 Tokenizer 的多語言 TTS 模型，支援創意聲音設計與高擬真聲音複製
repos.descriptionEn: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

repos.name: alibaba/zvec
repos.descriptionZhtw: 輕量、極速的進程內向量資料庫
repos.descriptionEn: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database

repos.name: rmyndharis/OpenWA
repos.descriptionZhtw: 免費開源的自架 WhatsApp API Gateway
repos.descriptionEn: Free, Open Source, Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway

repos.name: n0-computer/iroh
repos.descriptionZhtw: IP 位址會失效，改用 Key 撥號。以 Rust 打造的模組化網路堆疊
repos.descriptionEn: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.
